name: show_race_comparison
description: Show a horizontal carousel comparing all candidates in a race side by side with scorecards. Use when the user asks to compare candidates or asks who is running in a specific race.

race_category.description: The race category: governor, supreme_court, attorney_general, house, senate, ballot

office.description: The specific office like Governor, Supreme Court, U.S. House WI-3, Attorney General
